name: Gamora
text: Finesse — Response: After you play an [[attack]] event, remove 1 threat from a scheme. (Limit once per phase.) Precision — Response: After you play a [[thwart]] event, deal 1 damage to an enemy. (Limit once per phase.)
real_text: Finesse — Response: After you play an [[attack]] event, remove 1 threat from a scheme. (Limit once per phase.) Precision — Response: After you play a [[thwart]] event, deal 1 damage to an enemy. (Limit once per phase.)

linked_card.name: Gamora
linked_card.text:
Skilled Tactician — You may include up to 6 attack and/or thwart events in your deck from aspects other than your chosen aspect.

Action: Look at the top card of your deck. If that card is an attack or thwart event, draw it. (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.real_text: Skilled Tactician — You may include up to 6 [[attack]] and/or [[thwart]] events in your deck from aspects other than your chosen aspect. Action: Look at the top card of your deck. If that card is an [[attack]] or [[thwart]] event, draw it. (Limit once per round.)

name: Nebula
text: Response: After Nebula enters play, search your deck for an [[attack]] or [[thwart]] event and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
real_text: Response: After Nebula enters play, search your deck for an [[attack]] or [[thwart]] event and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
flavor: "This will be a fast fight."

name: Acrobatic Move
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy.
flavor: "If you really knew me as well as you thought you did, you would not have attacked me." —Gamora

name: Crosscounter
text: Hero Interrupt (attack/defense/thwart): When you would take any amount of damage, prevent 3 of that damage. Deal 1 damage to an enemy. Remove 1 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (attack/defense/thwart): When you would take any amount of damage, prevent 3 of that damage. Deal 1 damage to an enemy. Remove 1 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "That decision will be your last!" —Gamora

name: Set the Pace
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 1 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 1 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "They don't realize it's over." —Gamora

name: Decisive Blow
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy (7 damage instead if you have played a [[thwart]] event this turn).
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy (7 damage instead if you have played a [[thwart]] event this turn).
flavor: "Thanos built me for one purpose: to kill. He'll soon realize that was a poor decision." —Gamora

name: Forward Momentum
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme (5 threat instead if you have played an [[attack]] event this turn).
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme (5 threat instead if you have played an [[attack]] event this turn).
flavor: "This isn't going to go well for you." —Gamora

name: Conditioning Room
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Conditioning Room → return the bottommost [[attack]] or [[thwart]] event from your discard pile to your hand. Heal 1 damage from Gamora.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Conditioning Room → return the bottommost [[attack]] or [[thwart]] event from your discard pile to your hand. Heal 1 damage from Gamora.
flavor: "I'm always prepared." —Gamora

name: Keen Instincts
text: Resource: Exhaust Keen Instincts → generate a [wild] resource for an [[attack]] or [[thwart]] event.
real_text: Resource: Exhaust Keen Instincts → generate a [wild] resource for an [[attack]] or [[thwart]] event.
flavor: "Take your chances with me. You won't regret it." —Gamora

name: Gamora's Sword
text: Restricted. (Max 2 restricted cards per player). Response: After you play an [[attack]] event, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Restricted. (Max 2 restricted cards per player). Response: After you play an [[attack]] event, deal 1 damage to an enemy.

name: Angela
text: Forced Response: After Angela enters play under your control, search the top 10 cards of the encounter deck for a minion and put it into play engaged with you. Shuffle the encounter deck. If a minion was not put into play this way, discard Angela.
real_text: Forced Response: After Angela enters play under your control, search the top 10 cards of the encounter deck for a minion and put it into play engaged with you. Shuffle the encounter deck. If a minion was not put into play this way, discard Angela.

name: Clobber
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy. If this is the first card you have played this round, return this card to your hand.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy. If this is the first card you have played this round, return this card to your hand.
flavor: "If I have to hit you again, you'll stay down. For good." —Gamora

name: Plan of Attack
text: Action: Search the top 4 cards of your deck (top 7 cards instead if you are in alter-ego form) for an [[attack]] event and add that card to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
real_text: Action: Search the top 4 cards of your deck (top 7 cards instead if you are in alter-ego form) for an [[attack]] event and add that card to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
flavor: "No, I have a plan. Attack." —Star-Lord

name: Uppercut
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy.
flavor: SMACK!

name: First Hit
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to the villain. Hero Interrupt (attack): When a minion initiates an attack, deal 2 damage to that minion.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to the villain. Hero Interrupt (attack): When a minion initiates an attack, deal 2 damage to that minion.

name: Impede
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from the main scheme. If this is the first card you have played this round, return this card to your hand.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from the main scheme. If this is the first card you have played this round, return this card to your hand.
flavor: "First, you'll have to go through me." —Star-Lord

name: Combat Training
text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 ATK.
real_text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 ATK.
flavor: "Tony! She did it again!" —Janet Van Dyne

name: Godslayer
text: Restricted. Hero Interrupt: When your hero makes a basic attack against a unique enemy ([unique]), exhaust Godslayer → your hero gets +2 ATK for that attack.
real_text: Restricted. Hero Interrupt: When your hero makes a basic attack against a unique enemy ([unique]), exhaust Godslayer → your hero gets +2 ATK for that attack.

name: Drax
text:
Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait.
Drax cannot attack minions.
real_text:
Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait.
Drax cannot attack minions.
flavor: "Behold, this battle has raised my spirits greatly!"

name: Hit and Run
text: Hero Action (attack/thwart): Deal 2 damage to an enemy. Remove 2 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Hero Action (attack/thwart): Deal 2 damage to an enemy. Remove 2 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "You know, Lady Gamora, even when we first met—while I was beating you to death—I thought to myself, 'I bet she and I could be friends.'" —Angela

text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Unfulfilled Destiny
text: Give to the Gamora player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust your alter-ego → remove Unfulfilled Destiny from the game. • Choose and discard 2 events from your hand. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Gamora player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust your alter-ego → remove Unfulfilled Destiny from the game. • Choose and discard 2 events from your hand. Discard this obligation.

name: Sibling Rivalry
text: Players other than Gamora cannot remove threat from Sibling Rivalry Forced Response: After the villain phase begins, deal 1 facedown encounter card to Gamora.
real_text: Players other than Gamora cannot remove threat from Sibling Rivalry Forced Response: After the villain phase begins, deal 1 facedown encounter card to Gamora.
flavor: "One day, sister, our father will see that I am far more worthy than you." —Nebula

name: Nebula
text: Retaliate 2. Forced Interrupt: When this minion would enter play, discard the Nebula ally from play. (Gamora's nemesis minion.)
real_text: Retaliate 2. Forced Interrupt: When this minion would enter play, discard the Nebula ally from play. (Gamora's nemesis minion.)

name: In a Bind
text: Attach to Gamora. Treat Gamora's printed text box as if it were blank (except for [[traits]])). Hero Action: Choose and discard an [[attack]] event from your hand and deal 1 damage to Gamora → discard this card.
real_text: Attach to Gamora. Treat Gamora's printed text box as if it were blank (except for [[traits]])). Hero Action: Choose and discard an [[attack]] event from your hand and deal 1 damage to Gamora → discard this card.

name: Waylay
text: When Revealed: Stun and confuse Gamora. If Gamora is already stunned or confused, this card gains surge.
real_text: When Revealed: Stun and confuse Gamora. If Gamora is already stunned or confused, this card gains surge.
flavor: "You won't be father's favorite for much longer, dear sister." —Nebula

name: Pivotal Moment
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to the villain (5 damage instead if there is no threat on the main scheme).
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to the villain (5 damage instead if there is no threat on the main scheme).

name: Comms Implant
text:
Attach to a [[guardian]] ally. Max 1 per ally.
Attached ally gets +1 THW and +1 hit point.
real_text:
Attach to a [[guardian]] ally. Max 1 per ally.
Attached ally gets +1 THW and +1 hit point.

name: True Grit
text: Response (thwart): After your hero defends against an enemy attack, remove threat from a scheme equal to your hero's THW.
real_text: Response (thwart): After your hero defends against an enemy attack, remove threat from a scheme equal to your hero's THW.

real_text: Uses (3 energy counters). Hero Resource: Exhaust Enhanced Reflexes and remove 1 energy counter from it → generate a [energy] resource.
